qualitative_gate_conditions.note: Data layer of the gate is satisfied for Northwind (rebuilt at fit-up-m50 + re-seeded). The residual failingSections=6 is the base-Workforce org-scale perf-wall: iter-04 proved the m50 perf-patches (pagination + targetRole-authz-skip + FK indexes) reduce the wall 76.4s->~11.6s but the residual COLD members-grid query still exceeds the harness measurement budget -> skeleton false-fails persist (data-in-DB, slow-not-erroring). iter-05 targets the residual via a harness warm/poll deepening + the manager-manifest AI-readiness assertion (route /enterprise/workforce/ai-readiness) + the cockpit jump_to re-point.
